tutorSelection.adminDashboardDesc: Full administrative access to manage users, tests, and system settings

studentTests.title: Student Tests
studentTests.subtitle: View and Manage Tests
studentTests.noTestsType: No {{testType}} tests assigned to this student yet
studentTests.lockConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to lock this test? The student will not be able to access it until you unlock it again.

testManagement.title: Test Management
testManagement.subtitle: Configure Tests and Settings
testManagement.sectionOrderDesc: Configure the display order of test sections in the test track
testManagement.testSettingsDesc: Configure test durations, scoring, and other settings
testManagement.testReportsDesc: View analytics and reports across all tests and students

testTrackConfig.title: Configure Test Tracks
testTrackConfig.subtitle: Test Track Settings
testTrackConfig.configDesc: Configuration options will be added in a future update
testTrackConfig.mandatoryDesc: Sections must be completed in a fixed order
testTrackConfig.dragToReorder: Drag and drop to reorder sections. This order will be enforced when students take the test.
testTrackConfig.studentsWillSee: Students will see and complete sections in this exact order
testTrackConfig.allTestsSameDuration: All tests have the same duration
testTrackConfig.differentDurations: Tests in this track have different durations. Click to expand and see details.
testTrackConfig.setSameDuration: Set same duration for all tests
testTrackConfig.proportionalDesc: Divide total duration equally by number of sections
testTrackConfig.specificDesc: Set duration for each section individually
testTrackConfig.sectionsEqualTime: sections will each receive equal time allocation
testTrackConfig.setSpecificLimits: Set specific time limits for each section
testTrackConfig.timeAutomaticallyCalculated: Time automatically calculated based on total test duration
testTrackConfig.forwardOnlyDesc: Cannot go back to previous questions within a section
testTrackConfig.backForwardDesc: Can navigate freely between questions within a section
testTrackConfig.forwardOnlyBetweenDesc: Cannot go back to previous sections once completed
testTrackConfig.backForwardBetweenDesc: Can navigate freely between all sections
testTrackConfig.studentChoiceDesc: Student can choose to pause between sections
testTrackConfig.choosePauseSections: Choose after which sections the student must take a pause
testTrackConfig.howManyPauses: How many times can the student pause?
testTrackConfig.messageDisplayed: This message will be displayed to students before they start the test. It is auto-generated based on your configuration and can be edited.
testTrackConfig.messageAutogenerated: Test start message will be auto-generated...
testTrackConfig.editFreely: You can edit this message freely. Click "Regenerate" to restore the auto-generated version based on current settings.
testTrackConfig.completeRequired: Please complete all required fields before saving

takeTest.chooseSectionOrderDesc: Arrange the sections in the order you prefer to take them. Use the arrow buttons to reorder.
takeTest.pauseQuestion: Would you like to take a break before continuing?
takeTest.wellDone: Well done! Get ready for the next section.
takeTest.relaxAndRecharge: Relax and recharge before the next section
takeTest.question: Question
takeTest.mustAnswerQuestion: You must answer this question before proceeding.
takeTest.mustCompleteAllParts: Please complete all parts of this question before proceeding.
takeTest.timeUp: Time is up! Your test will be submitted automatically.
takeTest.multipleScreensError: Multiple screens detected. Please disconnect additional monitors before starting the test.
takeTest.multipleScreensDetected: Multiple screens were detected during the test.
takeTest.fullscreenExitDetected: You exited fullscreen mode during the test.
takeTest.contactInstructor: Please contact your instructor for further instructions.
takeTest.exitWarningMessage: You must stay in fullscreen mode during the test. If you exit, your test will be annulled.

testStartMsg.sectionsInOrder: This test contains {{count}} section(s) in the following order
testStartMsg.chooseOrder: You can choose the order in which to complete the sections.
testStartMsg.navForwardOnly: Navigation: You cannot go back to previous questions within a section.
testStartMsg.navBackForward: Navigation: You can navigate freely between questions within a section.
testStartMsg.betweenSectionsForward: Between sections: You cannot return to a previous section once completed.
testStartMsg.betweenSectionsBack: Between sections: You can navigate back to previous sections.
testStartMsg.mustAnswerAll: You must answer all questions before proceeding.
testStartMsg.noBreaks: Pauses: No breaks are allowed during the test.
testStartMsg.mandatoryBreaks: Mandatory breaks: You will have a {{minutes}}-minute break after
testStartMsg.optionalBreaks: Breaks: You can take up to {{max}} break(s) of {{minutes}} minutes each between sections.
testStartMsg.readInstructions: Please read all instructions carefully before starting the test.

testResults.title: Test Results
testResults.noMatchingQuestions: No questions match the selected filters
